title: Unbelievable Enchantment
body:
**本模组只适配 1.20.1，模组支持器为：Fabric
This mod is only compatible with version 1.20.1 and is supported by Fabric mod loader.
**
# **一、陆上窒息（头盔 / 胸甲・罕见）**
中文

触发条件：当玩家穿戴附有「陆上窒息」附魔的头盔或胸甲，踏上陆地（站在固体方块表面）时，效果立即激活。
效果机制：
生命值以每 5 游戏刻（0.25 秒）1 点的速度持续扣除，直至进入水域、虚空或死亡。
生存影响：强制玩家依赖水域生存，需高频往返陆地与水体，大幅提升陆地生存难度。

English

Trigger Condition：The enchantment activates immediately when the player equips a helmet/chestplate with "Suffocation on Land" and stands on solid blocks (land).
Effect Mechanism：
Health is drained at a rate of 1 HP every 5 game ticks (0.25s) until the player enters water, the void, or dies.
Survival Impact：Forces players to rely on water sources, requiring frequent movement between land and water, drastically increasing land survival challenge.

# **二、海洋嫌弃（靴子・史诗）**
中文

触发条件：穿戴「海洋嫌弃」附魔靴子的玩家接触任何水体（静止水、流动水、雨水）时，效果立即触发。
效果机制：
玩家被垂直弹飞 5 格高度，并附加 5 秒「脱水灼烧」（每 10 游戏刻 / 0.5 秒损失 1 点生命）。
特殊机制：与「冰霜行者」附魔互斥，同时穿戴时仅本附魔生效。

English

Trigger Condition：Activates instantly when the player wearing "Rejection of the Ocean" boots touches any water (still, flowing, rain).
Effect Mechanism：
The player is launched 5 blocks vertically and inflicted with "Dehydration Burn" (1 HP loss every 10 game ticks/0.5s for 5s).
Exclusive Mechanic：Conflicts with "Frost Walker" enchantment; only this enchantment works when both are equipped.

# **三、天地同寿（武器・诅咒史诗）**
中文

触发条件：使用附有「天地同寿」附魔的武器攻击时，有 30% 概率触发效果。
效果机制：
触发时秒杀目标生物，同时扣除玩家当前生命值的 50%（若剩余生命＜1，玩家死亡）。
风险提示：高风险高收益，建议在生命值充足且有回复手段时使用。

English

Trigger Condition：30% chance to activate when attacking with a weapon enchanted with "Perish Together".
Effect Mechanism：
Instantly kills the target and deducts 50% of the player's current HP (player dies if HP drops below 1).
Risk Warning：High risk, high reward; use only when HP is full and healing is available.
